title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.4.1
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.4.1 to production. Fixed petition submission validation bug.

title: beuportal-backup-01 Host Down
text: Backup host beuportal-backup-01 failed its health check. rsync job missed. Investigating.

title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.4.0
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.4.0. Added grievance module and PDF export feature.

title: DB Connection Pool Warning Cleared
text: PostgreSQL connection count dropped back below threshold on beuportal-db-01. Monitor auto-resolved.

title: SSL Cert Renewed - beueastbridge.org
text: SSL certificate for beueastbridge.org renewed via Let's Encrypt. Valid for 90 days.

title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.3.5
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.3.5. Improved contract feedback form and member search.

title: Elasticsearch Reindex Complete
text: Full reindex of BEU Portal document search on beuportal-search-01 completed in 4m32s.

title: Redis Eviction Spike Resolved
text: Redis memory eviction spike on beuportal-cache-01 resolved after cache TTL tuning.

title: Login Failure Spike - Investigated
text: 20+ failed logins in 5 min from 45.33.12.88. Added IP to Cloudflare block list. False alarm (scrapers).

title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.3.0
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.3.0. Contract Campaign 2026 module released to production.

title: SSL Cert Renewed - russoteacheshistory.com
text: SSL certificate for russoteacheshistory.com renewed. Valid for 90 days.

title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.2.8
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.2.8. Fixed email notification delivery for grievance submissions.

title: Scheduled Maintenance - DB Vacuum
text: Scheduled PostgreSQL VACUUM ANALYZE completed on beuportal-db-01. Tables optimized.

title: beucontract2026.com Launched
text: Campaign site beucontract2026.com deployed and DNS confirmed live. Monitoring enabled.

title: Worker Queue Backlog Alert Fired
text: Celery queue on beuportal-worker-01 exceeded 100 tasks. Resolved after scaling worker threads.

title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.2.5
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.2.5. Member directory search improvements.

title: Mailgun Domain Verified - beueastbridge.org
text: Mailgun domain verification confirmed for beueastbridge.org. SPF and DKIM passing.

title: apushprimary.net SSL Renewed
text: SSL certificate for apushprimary.net auto-renewed via Cloudflare.

title: BEU Portal Deployment - v2.2.0
text: Deployed beu-portal-app v2.2.0. Introduced document library and petition tracking features.

title: High Error Rate Alert Cleared
text: Error rate on beu-portal-app returned below threshold after hotfix deployment of v2.2.1.
